title: spathelia excelsa
intro: Spathelia excelsa, also known as the Pride of Jamaica or Pride of St. Lucia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to the presence of limonoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Spathelia excelsa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Spathelia excelsa can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, allowing for a convenient and natural way to harness its medicinal properties.
